name: Read PLY file
description: Tests basic PLY reading with pcread
prompt: Read the point cloud from 'teapot.ply' and display how many points it has.
expected_output: Uses pcread to read the PLY file and accesses the Count property.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB

name: Read PCD file
description: Tests PCD reading with pcread using toolbox sample data
prompt: Read the highway scene point cloud from fullfile(toolboxdir('lidar'),'lidardata','highwayScene.pcd') and report its X range.
expected_output: Uses pcread for PCD file and accesses XLimits property.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB

name: Read LAS file with attributes
description: Tests LAS reading with two-output syntax to get classification
prompt: Read the aerial lidar data from fullfile(toolboxdir('lidar'),'lidardata','las','aerialLidarData.laz') and extract the classification labels.
expected_output: Uses lasFileReader + two-output readPointCloud to access Classification from lidarPointAttributes.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses two-output syntax to get point attributes
assertions.expected: Two left-hand variables from readPointCloud, e.g. [ptCloud, ptAttr] = readPointCloud(reader)

name: Read LAS with classification filter
description: Tests filtering by classification during LAS read
prompt: Read only the ground points (classification 2) from fullfile(toolboxdir('lidar'),'lidardata','las','aerialLidarData.laz').
expected_output: Uses lasFileReader + readPointCloud with Classification=2 name-value argument. Does not use pcread.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB
Filters at read-time rather than post-read
assertions.expected: Passes Classification as a name-value argument to readPointCloud rather than reading all points and filtering afterwards

name: Read LAS with GPS time filter
description: Tests filtering by GPS time span during LAS read
prompt: Read the first 30 seconds of GPS-timestamped points from fullfile(toolboxdir('lidar'),'lidardata','las','aerialLidarData.laz').
expected_output: Uses lasFileReader + readPointCloud with GpsTimeSpan name-value argument. Accesses reader.GPSTimeLimits for the start time.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB
Constructs time range from GPSTimeLimits property
assertions.expected: Accesses reader.GPSTimeLimits to determine the start time and adds seconds(30) for the end

name: Read LAS with spatial ROI filter
description: Tests filtering by spatial bounding box during LAS read
prompt: Read only the points within a 50x50 meter area from the southwest corner of fullfile(toolboxdir('lidar'),'lidardata','las','aerialLidarData.laz'). Use the file's spatial extent to determine the corner.
expected_output: Uses lasFileReader + readPointCloud with ROI name-value argument. Constructs ROI from reader.XLimits and reader.YLimits.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB
Constructs ROI from file extent properties
assertions.expected: Accesses reader.XLimits and reader.YLimits to build the 6-element ROI vector [xmin xmax ymin ymax zmin zmax]

name: Read Velodyne PCAP file
description: Tests Velodyne PCAP reading with mandatory device model
prompt: Read point cloud frames from 'lidarData_ConstructionRoad.pcap' which was recorded with an HDL-32E sensor.
expected_output: Uses velodyneFileReader with 'HDL32E' device model and hasFrame/readFrame loop.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB

name: Read E57 multi-scan file
description: Tests E57 reading with indexed access for multiple scans
prompt: I have an E57 file called 'building.e57' that contains multiple scans. Read all scans from it.
expected_output: Uses e57FileReader, checks NumPointClouds, loops with readPointCloud(reader, idx).

assertions.description: Accesses NumPointClouds to determine scan count
Loops over all scans rather than reading only the first
assertions.expected: Loop from 1 to reader.NumPointClouds with readPointCloud(reader, idx)

name: Write PLY binary
description: Tests writing point cloud to PLY with binary encoding
prompt: Read fullfile(toolboxdir('lidar'),'lidardata','highwayScene.pcd') and save it as a PLY file at fullfile(tempdir,'highway.ply') in binary format.
expected_output: Uses pcread for PCD input, then pcwrite with Encoding='binary' for PLY output.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB

name: Write PCD compressed
description: Tests writing to PCD with compressed encoding
prompt: Read 'teapot.ply' and save a compressed copy as fullfile(tempdir,'teapot.pcd').
expected_output: Uses pcread for PLY input, pcwrite with Encoding='compressed' for PCD output.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB

name: Write LAS with attributes preserved
description: Tests attribute preservation through read-write pipeline
prompt: Read fullfile(toolboxdir('lidar'),'lidardata','las','aerialLidarData.laz') with all its attributes and save an exact copy to fullfile(tempdir,'aerial_copy.laz') without losing any point attributes.
expected_output: Uses lasFileReader + two-output readPointCloud, then lasFileWriter + three-argument writePointCloud.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB

assertions.expected: writePointCloud(writer, ptCloud, ptAttr) with three arguments including the attributes object

name: Write LAS with specific version
description: Tests lasFileWriter with LasVersion name-value argument
prompt: Create a random point cloud of 5000 points with classification labels and write it to fullfile(tempdir,'classified.las') using LAS version 1.4.
expected_output: Constructs pointCloud and lidarPointAttributes, uses lasFileWriter with LasVersion='1.4', three-arg writePointCloud.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB

name: Format routing — LAS input routed correctly
description: Tests that LAS file is NOT read with pcread
prompt: I have a file called survey.las. How do I load it into MATLAB?
expected_output: Uses lasFileReader + readPointCloud. Does not use pcread.

assertions.description: Routes LAS to lasFileReader, not pcread
assertions.expected: Uses lasFileReader (not pcread) for .las files — pcread only supports PLY and PCD formats

name: Format routing — LAS output routed correctly
description: Tests that LAS output is NOT written with pcwrite
prompt: I have a pointCloud object. Save it as 'output.las'.
expected_output: Uses lasFileWriter + writePointCloud. Does not use pcwrite.

assertions.description: Routes LAS to lasFileWriter, not pcwrite
assertions.expected: Uses lasFileWriter (not pcwrite) for .las output — pcwrite only supports PLY and PCD formats

name: Format routing — PLY encoding constraint
description: Tests that compressed encoding is not used for PLY
prompt: Save my point cloud to 'result.ply' with the most compact encoding possible.
expected_output: Uses pcwrite with Encoding='binary' (not compressed, which is invalid for PLY).

assertions.description: Uses binary encoding (most compact valid for PLY)
Does not use compressed encoding for PLY
assertions.expected: Uses binary (not compressed) encoding for PLY — compressed is only valid for PCD format

name: PCAP reader without device model — asks user
description: Tests that agent asks for device model when not provided
prompt: Read point clouds from my Velodyne PCAP file 'drive.pcap'.
expected_output: Either asks which Velodyne model or uses velodyneFileReader with a device model argument. Must not omit the model.

assertions.description: Includes device model or asks which model the user has
assertions.expected: Either provides a DeviceModel string as second argument OR asks the user to specify which Velodyne model they have

name: Convert LAS to PCD
description: Tests cross-format conversion pipeline (LAS reader to pcwrite)
prompt: Convert fullfile(toolboxdir('lidar'),'lidardata','las','aerialLidarData.laz') to PCD format and save as fullfile(tempdir,'aerial.pcd').
expected_output: Reads with lasFileReader + readPointCloud, writes with pcwrite for PCD output.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses correct reader-writer pairing for cross-format conversion
assertions.expected: Reads with lasFileReader + readPointCloud, then writes with pcwrite — does not use lasFileWriter for PCD output

name: Convert PCD to PLY
description: Tests simple format conversion between pcread/pcwrite formats
prompt: Read fullfile(toolboxdir('lidar'),'lidardata','highwayScene.pcd') and save it as fullfile(tempdir,'highway.ply').
expected_output: Uses pcread for PCD input and pcwrite for PLY output.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB

name: PCAP frames to individual PLY files
description: Tests reading PCAP frames and saving each to separate PLY files
prompt: Read the first 3 frames from 'lidarData_ConstructionRoad.pcap' (sensor: HDL32E) and save each frame as fullfile(tempdir,'frame_001.ply'), fullfile(tempdir,'frame_002.ply'), fullfile(tempdir,'frame_003.ply').
expected_output: Uses velodyneFileReader with HDL32E, readFrame in a loop limited to 3 iterations, pcwrite for each frame to PLY.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB

name: Filter and write — classification subset to LAZ
description: Tests reading with filter and writing with attribute preservation
prompt: Read only the building points (classification 6) from fullfile(toolboxdir('lidar'),'lidardata','las','aerialLidarData.laz') and write them to fullfile(tempdir,'buildings.laz') keeping all attributes intact.
expected_output: Uses lasFileReader + readPointCloud(reader, Classification=6) with two-output, then lasFileWriter + three-arg writePointCloud.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB
Classification filter during read + three-arg write preserves attributes
assertions.expected: readPointCloud with Classification=6 and two-output syntax, then writePointCloud with three arguments

name: Edge case — Intensity on correct object
description: Tests that Intensity is accessed from pointCloud, not lidarPointAttributes
prompt: Read fullfile(toolboxdir('lidar'),'lidardata','las','aerialLidarData.laz') and get both the intensity values and classification labels.
expected_output: Gets intensity from ptCloud.Intensity and classification from ptAttributes.Classification.

assertions.description: Code runs without error in MATLAB
Intensity accessed from pointCloud object, not lidarPointAttributes
assertions.expected: ptCloud.Intensity or similar — Intensity is a property of pointCloud, accessed from the first output of readPointCloud

assertions.description: Classification accessed from lidarPointAttributes, not pointCloud
assertions.expected: ptAttributes.Classification or similar — Classification is on the second output (lidarPointAttributes)

name: Edge case — organized point cloud and PLY limitation
description: Tests awareness that PLY flattens organized point clouds
prompt: I have an organized M-by-N-by-3 point cloud. I want to save it and reload it later preserving the organized structure. What format should I use?
expected_output: Recommends PCD format (not PLY) because PLY flattens organized M-by-N-by-3 to unorganized M-by-3.

assertions.description: Explains PLY limitation with organized point clouds
assertions.expected: Mentions that PLY converts organized to unorganized or flattens the structure

name: Ibeo IDC file routing
description: Tests that .idc files are routed to ibeoLidarReader, not pcread or other readers
prompt: I have an Ibeo sensor recording saved as 'drive_log.idc'. How do I read the lidar data from it?
expected_output: Uses ibeoLidarReader to create reader and readMessages to read point cloud data.

assertions.description: Routes IDC to ibeoLidarReader, not other readers
assertions.expected: Uses ibeoLidarReader (not pcread or velodyneFileReader) for .idc files

name: Ibeo IDC — accessing file info and message metadata
description: Tests correct usage of ibeoLidarReader properties and two-output readMessages
prompt: How do I access file metadata and message data from an Ibeo IDC recording? I want to know the number of messages, available message types, and how to get both point clouds and message metadata (timestamps, labels).
expected_output: Uses ibeoLidarReader, accesses NumMessages and MessageTypes, uses two-output readMessages to get both ptClouds and messageData.

assertions.description: Uses two-output readMessages for message metadata
assertions.expected: Two left-hand variables from readMessages, e.g. [ptClouds, messageData] = readMessages(reader)

name: Ibeo IDC — read only scan messages
description: Tests filtering readMessages by message type
prompt: From my Ibeo IDC file 'highway.idc', read only the scan data messages (not point cloud plane messages). Return the point clouds.
expected_output: Uses ibeoLidarReader + readMessages with Messages="Scan" filter.

assertions.description: Uses Messages name-value argument for filtering
assertions.expected: Messages= name-value argument passed to readMessages, e.g. readMessages(reader, Messages="Scan")

name: Ibeo IDC — read messages in time range
description: Tests filtering readMessages by time range
prompt: I have an Ibeo recording 'city_drive.idc'. Read only the messages from the first 5 seconds of the file.
expected_output: Uses ibeoLidarReader, accesses FileInfo or timestamps to determine start time, then uses Time name-value argument with readMessages.

assertions.description: Constructs a time range for filtering
assertions.expected: Uses Time= name-value argument with a datetime range or duration, e.g. Time=[tStart tStart+seconds(5)]

name: Ibeo IDC — extract point cloud planes with labels
description: Tests reading PointCloudPlane messages and accessing classification labels from messageData
prompt: How would I read only the PointCloudPlane messages from an Ibeo IDC file and extract the classification label for each plane?
expected_output: Uses ibeoLidarReader, reads with Messages="PointCloudPlane", uses two-output readMessages, accesses Label field from messageData.

assertions.description: Uses two-output readMessages to get messageData
assertions.expected: Two left-hand variables from readMessages, e.g. [ptClouds, messageData] = readMessages(reader, ...)
